openFindings.title: description.json parentChain still reflects the retired 010 tuning segment
openFindings.description: The packet moved to `001-search-and-routing-tuning`, but `description.json.parentChain` still stores `010-search-and-routing-tuning`, so downstream description indexing emits the wrong ancestry tokens and hierarchy.

openFindings.title: Core rationale points at a missing ../research/research.md artifact
openFindings.description: The plan, decision record, and checklist all rely on `../research/research.md`, but that path is absent under the parent packet, leaving the checklist-aware fallback rationale unverifiable from the packet itself.

openFindings.title: Packet evidence still cites stale parser line anchors for deriveStatus()
openFindings.description: Multiple packet docs still cite `graph-metadata-parser.ts:498-510` as the active status-derivation anchor, but the live fallback now sits at `969-1014`, so the packet’s own evidence pointers no longer resolve to the claimed logic.

openFindings.title: tasks.md uses non-canonical task IDs that the task-update merger will not match
openFindings.description: This packet labels tasks as `T-01` and `T-V1`, but the canonical merge/update path only recognizes `T###` and `CHK-###`, so routed task updates cannot reliably target these checklist entries.

openFindings.title: spec.md under-documents the delivered verification surface
openFindings.description: The packet’s primary `Key Files` section names only `graph-metadata-parser.ts`, even though the implementation summary and derived graph metadata both show `graph-metadata-schema.vitest.ts` as part of the delivered surface, which narrows the packet’s documented verification scope.

openFindings.title: graph-metadata.json exposes root-scoped repository topology in derived paths
openFindings.description: Derived `key_files` and `entities` publish root-scoped `.opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/...` paths even though the packet already carries narrower packet-local references, which broadens searchable internal layout exposure.

openFindings.title: derived key_files duplicates the same logical files under two path spellings
openFindings.description: The derived `key_files` list carries both `.opencode/skill/system-spec-kit/mcp_server/...` and `mcp_server/...` spellings for the parser and test file, which adds noisy duplicates and increases normalization burden for follow-on consumers.
